implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Implements HTTP GET to JSONPlaceholder, parses response, constructs CSV headers and rows, and writes CSV to storage. Still does not filter by 'Boone' and still writes CSV even when API array is empty, violating acceptance criteria.
implementation.name: main
implementation.pseudo_code:
FUNCTION main:
    SEND HTTP GET request to USERS_URL
    IF response not OK: THROW error
    PARSE JSON into users array
    DEFINE headers list
    MAP users to CSV rows using userToRow
    JOIN headers and rows into CSV string
    CREATE data directory if missing
    WRITE CSV string to CSV_PATH
    LOG saved message

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Converts a single User object into CSV row values and escapes fields as needed.
implementation.name: userToRow
implementation.pseudo_code:
FUNCTION userToRow(u):
    RETURN array of stringified user fields
    APPLY escapeCsvField to fields containing text

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Escapes commas, quotes, and newlines to maintain valid CSV formatting.
implementation.name: escapeCsvField
implementation.pseudo_code:
FUNCTION escapeCsvField(value):
    CONVERT value to string
    IF value contains ',', '"', or '\n':
        RETURN quoted string with escaped quotes
    ELSE:
        RETURN string

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Exposes saved CSV user information. Reads CSV, converts to JSON, and returns it if present.
implementation.name: GET /api/users
implementation.pseudo_code:
ENDPOINT GET /api/users:
    IF CSV file does not exist: RETURN 404
    READ CSV file from storage
    PARSE CSV using csvToJson
    RETURN JSON array

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Parses CSV text into JSON objects returned by the API endpoint.
implementation.name: csvToJson
implementation.pseudo_code:
FUNCTION csvToJson(csv):
    SPLIT into lines and filter out empty ones
    IF fewer than 2 lines: RETURN empty array
    PARSE header line
    FOR each remaining line:
        PARSE into fields
        MAP fields to header names
    RETURN resulting array

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: Parses lines from CSV respecting quotes and escaped characters.
implementation.name: parseCsvLine
implementation.pseudo_code:
FUNCTION parseCsvLine(line):
    ITERATE characters
    HANDLE quoted and unquoted field segments
    RETURN list of parsed fields

implementation.How_is_it_connected_to_implementation: No implementation exists for filtering user data by 'Boone' before saving CSV.
implementation.name: filterUsersByLocation

missing_implementations: before saving information check filter for data with location as Boone
If the API request fails or the response is empty, the system does not create or modify the CSV file and signals an error.
